columns.description: The fire apparatus that responded to the call. The values are entered manually.

columns.name: incident_number
columns.description: Incident number: System-generated unique identifier assigned to a response to a call for service. The format is 'YY-#######' where YY= last two digits of the 'notif_datetime' field's year; #######= the unique sequence number associated with the incident. For example, the first incident recorded in 2021 would have an inci_no of '21-0000001'.

columns.name: incident_type_description
columns.description: Incident description: The description of the type of incident to which crews responded. The descriptions are correlated with the field 'inci_type'.

columns.name: alarm_at
columns.description: Alarm date-time: Dispatch system-generated timestamp of when dispatch received the call for service. The validity of this field is in question as it equals 'notif_datetime' 100% of the time.

columns.name: state
columns.description: State: Dispatch system-generated state in which the incident occurs.

columns.name: zip
columns.description: Zipcode: Dispatch system-generated zipcode in which the incident occurs.

columns.name: response_time
columns.description: Response time in minutes: arrived_at subtracted by enroute_at.

columns.name: incident_type
columns.description: Incident type: A 3-digit code defined by the National Fire Incident Reporting System that automatically correlates to the 'inci_desc' field

columns.name: address
columns.description: Address: Dispatch system-generated exact address for the location of the incident.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City: Dispatch system-generated city in which the incident occurs.

columns.name: arrived_at
columns.description: Arrival date-time: How generated? Timestamp of when the fire apparatus is at a complete stop at the incident destination.

columns.name: enroute_at
columns.description: Roll date-time: How generated? Timestamp of when the front tires of the fire apparatus are out of the station doors.

columns.name: dispatch_notified_at
columns.description: Notification date-time: Dispatch system-generated timestamp that contains the date and time when dispatch notified the Fire Department of the incident. This timestamp starts the clock for all of the time-based metrics for the department.

description: Taste and odor issues with drinking water stem from the presence of the organic compounds known as methylisoborneol (MIB) and geosmin.
